news.title:
Dixon Tech projects strong mobile volume growth FY26e-28e via backward integration, new products, and exports.
The company plans to enter the industrial EMS space, boosting diversification efforts.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech projects strong mobile volume growth FY26e-28e via backward integration, new products, and exports.
The company plans to enter the industrial EMS space, boosting diversification efforts.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies expressed confidence at Investec Conference on Pn3 approval for Vivo JV.
Post approval, the JV may produce two-thirds of Vivo's 35M mobile sales in India.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies expressed confidence at Investec Conference on Pn3 approval for Vivo JV.
Post approval, the JV may produce two-thirds of Vivo's 35M mobile sales in India.

news.title:
Dixon Tech's management shared at Investec Conference that mobile demand is better than feared.
FY27e mobile volumes, excluding Vivo, are expected to match FY26e levels.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech's management shared at Investec Conference that mobile demand is better than feared.
FY27e mobile volumes, excluding Vivo, are expected to match FY26e levels.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies disclosed issuing a $10M guarantee for its subsidiary PEPL to Foxlink India Electric.
Guarantee is contingent liability; no immediate impact on Dixon's financials reported.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies disclosed issuing a $10M guarantee for its subsidiary PEPL to Foxlink India Electric.
Guarantee is contingent liability; no immediate impact on Dixon's financials reported.

news.title:
Axis Capital predicts Dixon FY26 shipments below guidance; weakness to persist into H1FY27.
Rising memory prices hurt budget phone demand, impacting iSmartU and Xiaomi volumes.
news.summary:
Axis Capital predicts Dixon FY26 shipments below guidance; weakness to persist into H1FY27.
Rising memory prices hurt budget phone demand, impacting iSmartU and Xiaomi volumes.

news.title:
India plans new smartphone incentives tying subsidies to exports, local components.
Dixon Technologies may benefit due to focus on local manufacturing.
news.summary:
India plans new smartphone incentives tying subsidies to exports, local components.
Dixon Technologies may benefit due to focus on local manufacturing.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley keeps Underweight on Dixon Tech with ₹8,157 TP due to reduced FY26 mobile PLI allocations.
Concerns over PLI 2.0, DRAM price impact on FY27 shipments, despite FY26 PLI aiding margins.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley keeps Underweight on Dixon Tech with ₹8,157 TP due to reduced FY26 mobile PLI allocations.
Concerns over PLI 2.0, DRAM price impact on FY27 shipments, despite FY26 PLI aiding margins.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight rating on Dixon Technologies.
Target price set at ₹8,157.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight rating on Dixon Technologies.
Target price set at ₹8,157.

news.title: Dixon Technologies rebounds from lows, gaining nearly 3%.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies rebounds from lows, gaining nearly 3%.

news.title:
Union Cabinet eases FDI rules for border-sharing countries, enabling JVs in electronics manufacturing with China.
Dixon Technologies forms JV with HKC Overseas for LCD modules; policy aims to boost domestic electronics manufacturing.
news.summary:
Union Cabinet eases FDI rules for border-sharing countries, enabling JVs in electronics manufacturing with China.
Dixon Technologies forms JV with HKC Overseas for LCD modules; policy aims to boost domestic electronics manufacturing.

news.title:
Dixon's HKC JV approval may boost profitability by 5-10%, says IIFL.
Vivo JV approval seen as key for Dixon's smartphone volume growth.
news.summary:
Dixon's HKC JV approval may boost profitability by 5-10%, says IIFL.
Vivo JV approval seen as key for Dixon's smartphone volume growth.

news.title: Dixon Technologies shares surged 11% driven by two major factors.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies shares surged 11% driven by two major factors.

news.title:
JPMorgan cuts target for Dixon to ₹13,000, citing HKC JV approval boosting EBITDA.
EPS for FY27–28 trimmed by 13–14%; projected earnings CAGR ~36% FY26–28.
news.summary:
JPMorgan cuts target for Dixon to ₹13,000, citing HKC JV approval boosting EBITDA.
EPS for FY27–28 trimmed by 13–14%; projected earnings CAGR ~36% FY26–28.

news.title:
Nomura maintains 'Buy' on Dixon Technologies, sets target price ₹14,678, citing margin expansion from JV approval.
JV trials to commence 2QFY27; ramp-up in 2HFY27 may add 50-100 bps to margins; stock trades at ~30× FY28 EPS.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains 'Buy' on Dixon Technologies, sets target price ₹14,678, citing margin expansion from JV approval.
JV trials to commence 2QFY27; ramp-up in 2HFY27 may add 50-100 bps to margins; stock trades at ~30× FY28 EPS.

news.title: Jefferies maintains 'Hold' on Dixon Tech, targets Rs 11,350.
news.summary: Jefferies maintains 'Hold' on Dixon Tech, targets Rs 11,350.

news.title:
Dixon Tech secures MEITY approval for HKC's investment in display segment.
The move aims to boost Dixon's capabilities and market reach.
news.summary:
Dixon Tech secures MEITY approval for HKC's investment in display segment.
The move aims to boost Dixon's capabilities and market reach.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies gets govt nod for JV with HKC Overseas.
Dixon holds 74% equity; JV targets display modules & electronics growth.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies gets govt nod for JV with HKC Overseas.
Dixon holds 74% equity; JV targets display modules & electronics growth.

news.title:
US-Iran war disrupts chip supply, impacting auto and EMS sectors; Nifty Auto index down 3.6%, led by losses in Samvardhana Motherson, Tata Motors PV, Ashok Leyland.
EMS stocks fall; Dixon Tech hits multi-year low amid rising DRAM prices; Morgan Stanley sets target of ₹8,157 citing headwinds in memory chip costs.
news.summary:
US-Iran war disrupts chip supply, impacting auto and EMS sectors; Nifty Auto index down 3.6%, led by losses in Samvardhana Motherson, Tata Motors PV, Ashok Leyland.
EMS stocks fall; Dixon Tech hits multi-year low amid rising DRAM prices; Morgan Stanley sets target of ₹8,157 citing headwinds in memory chip costs.

news.title: Dixon Technologies sees a block trade worth ₹120.6 crores, involving 119,088 shares at ₹10,126 each.
news.summary: Dixon Technologies sees a block trade worth ₹120.6 crores, involving 119,088 shares at ₹10,126 each.

news.title:
Dixon Technologies acquired 74% in Dixtel Infocom Pvt Ltd via JV with Longcheer, investing INR 7.39 Cr.
Dixtel Infocom will focus on manufacturing smart devices and electronics, boosting ODM expertise in India.
news.summary:
Dixon Technologies acquired 74% in Dixtel Infocom Pvt Ltd via JV with Longcheer, investing INR 7.39 Cr.
Dixtel Infocom will focus on manufacturing smart devices and electronics, boosting ODM expertise in India.
